name: What if no witnesses to my work injury in Holladay?

mainEntity.name: What if no witnesses to my work injury in Holladay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical proof and your report often enough.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Still viable; your testimony, medical records, and circumstances suffice if AOE/COE met.[1][4] Presumed on-premises/on-clock.[1] Key factors: Consistent story to doctor/insurer; photos/logs; timely report.[2] Practical guidance: Note details immediately, get exam showing injury, use coworker indirect knowledge. Lawyers build cases without witnesses.

description: Medical proof and your report often enough.[1]
